arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals Man United's Bruno Fernandes transfer stance amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim insists Bruno Fernandes will not leave Old Trafford despite speculation linking him with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta tips Bukayo Saka to make instant Arsenal impact in warning to Real Madrid
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka will make his long-awaited return for Arsenal on Tuesday night and it could be with a start against Fulham, as Mikel Arteta insists that he's 'ready to go'

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives telling Bruno Fernandes update amid Real Madrid transfer link
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim insists Bruno Fernandes will not be leaving Old Trafford this summer despite reports of interest from Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim addresses Bruno Fernandes' future amid talk of Real Madrid lining up £90m bid for the Manchester United captain
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim insists Manchester United can satisfy Bruno Fernandes' ambitions, and has ruled out any chance of his captain leaving Old Trafford this summer.

arts.ttl: Bruno to Real Madrid? Amorim's blunt response to latest rumour
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is adamant he wants Bruno Fernandes to remain at the club and that's he not for sale in the summer.

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Real Sociedad injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Copa del Rey clash between Real Madrid and Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti’s stance on his Real Madrid future ‘appears to be changing’

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney reveals how he spurned approaches from Real Madrid and Barcelona as Man United legend urges Liverpool fans to lay off Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has revealed just how close he came to leaving Man United for Spain and says he can understand why Trent Alexander-Arnold may be tempted to join Real Madrid this summer.
